document.title: Life Cycle Report For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life cycle report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents the life cycle of the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
keyPoints: The report identifies the AC-DC Power Converter RPS-200-12 as a part key.
The basis is the Capacitor Life Cycle of MEANWELL test report.
The reported result is 11348.7 hours under 230VAC input voltage, full load output, and 50℃ temperature.
Estimated service life is stated as about 5 years based on 8 hours use per day and 2,400 hours per year.

evidence.claim: The document is a life cycle report for a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Cycle Report For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered product models are HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
The report number and revision are A-TCF-5-016 (Rev.0).
The document overview states that the document is the life cycle of the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is life cycle of the HAD1717MG,HAD1717MC.

evidence.claim: The part key is an AC-DC Power Converter with model RPS-200-12.
The vendor for RPS-200-12 is MEANWELL.
The life cycle basis is the Capacitor Life Cycle of MEANWELL test report.
evidence.evidenceText: Basis - Capacitor Life Cycle of MEANWELL test report

evidence.claim: The test condition is 230VAC input voltage, full load output, and 50℃ temperature.
evidence.evidenceText: Input Voltage: 230VAC Output Load: Full Load Temperature: 50℃

evidence.claim: The stated frequency of use is 8 hours per day, 48 hours per week, 192 hours per month, and 2,400 hours per year.
The estimated service life is about 5 years.
